description: Negative-control bundles derived from review-passing and policy-blocked evidence-chain runs. Each scenario preserves or corrupts specific bundle properties to test whether the independent review contract can reject malformed evidence.

scenarios.description: Remove the explicit intent object while preserving all downstream digests and receipt artifacts.
Remove the persisted governance decision while preserving integrity and receipt bindings.
Forge one receipt artifact digest while leaving the trace integrity chain untouched.
Modify the executed result payload after export without updating the stored digests.
Declare a tamper outcome without an independently corroborated digest mismatch.
Replace the trace with one from a different review-passing run while rebinding the receipt to the current bundle.
Swap in a receipt from a different review-passing bundle without updating its artifact digests.
Rewrite a policy-blocked bundle to claim successful completion while leaving the blocked policy decision in place.

title: Falsification Checks
